title: Lacey's CobbleSwapper
body:
## **_Lacey's CobbleSwapper_**

A small-ish resource pack that adds in [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) items to [ItemSwapper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper)! Designed to make bulding with Cobblemon blocks easier, because I don't think it's just me who wants to make building with tumblestone and its many variants easier.

To add this to your game, just place this pack in your Resource Packs folder.

Happy building and catching!

_Requires both Cobblemon and ItemSwapper to function, of course. Support can be requested over at the Official Cobblemon Discord._
